content.intro: At Lavie AI, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we handle the data you provide when using our AI Image Generator.

sections.title: 1. Image Generation & Storage
sections.text: When you generate images using Lavie AI, the process and storage depend on your account status:
bullets: Free & Guest Users: Images generated by free registered users and guests are public by default and will be displayed on our Photo Wall to inspire others. Note: Guest generations are tied to your current device and browser session. If you use a public computer, another user logging in on the same browser might inherit your guest history. Guest generations are periodically cleared to manage server space.

Premium Subscribers: Images generated by active premium subscribers (Creator, Plus, Studio) are private by default and securely stored in your personal history. You have full control over your images and can delete them permanently from your account at any time.

sections.title: 2. AI Model Training
sections.text: We have a strict policy regarding your creativity: Your prompts, uploaded reference images, and generated artworks are never used to train our AI models or shared with third-party model providers for training purposes.

sections.title: 3. Taking Control of Your Data
sections.text: If you wish to have full control over the privacy and retention of your generated images, we strongly recommend creating a free account. Registered users can manage, download, or delete their generation history directly from their dashboard.

content.intro: Welcome to Lavie AI. By accessing or using our AI Image Generator, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.text: By using Lavie AI, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

sections.title: 2. User Content & Usage Rights
sections.text: When you generate images using Lavie AI:
bullets: Commercial Use: Active Premium Subscribers (Creator, Plus, Studio) can use generated images for both personal and commercial purposes. You retain full ownership of these images.

Free & Guest Generations: Images generated by Free registered users and Guest Users (without an account) are the intellectual property of Lavie AI. They are provided for personal, non-commercial use only.

Content Restrictions: You agree not to use our service to generate illegal, hateful, explicit (NSFW), or harassing content. We reserve the right to immediately suspend accounts and delete content that violates these guidelines.

sections.title: 3. Service Availability
sections.text: While we strive to provide uninterrupted service, Lavie AI is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We do not guarantee that the service will be error-free or constantly available. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say About Lavie AI

t1.text: Absolutely incredible! The image quality is amazing and it's completely free. I've tried many AI generators but this is by far the best.
t1.name: Sarah Chen

t2.text: The variety of styles is outstanding. From anime to photorealistic, it handles everything perfectly. My go-to tool for creative projects.

t3.text: No login required and completely free! Perfect for quick experiments and brainstorming. The generation speed is impressive.

t4.text: Lavie AI transformed my workflow. The UI is incredibly intuitive, and the results are stunning every single time.
t4.name: David Kim

t5.text: I can't believe this is free. The prompt adherence is spot on, capturing even the smallest details I specify.
t5.name: Laura Martinez

t6.text: Lightning fast! I generated a dozen variations for my ad campaign in under a minute.

t7.text: The anime style model is breathtaking. It perfectly captures the aesthetic I was aiming for.

t8.text: Finally, a generator that doesn't hide its best features behind a paywall. Lavie AI is a game changer.

t9.text: The lighting and composition controls are so easy to use. Highly recommended for concept art.

t10.text: I use Lavie AI every day for my blog posts. The visual quality makes my articles stand out.

t11.text: Such a clean and modern interface. It’s a joy to use compared to other cluttered tools.

t12.text: The 3D render style looks incredibly professional. It saved me hours of modeling time.

t13.text: I love the 'Surprise Me' feature! It gives me amazing ideas when I have creative block.

t14.text: Unmatched speed and quality. This is now an essential part of my design toolkit.

t15.text: The negative prompt feature works flawlessly, giving me exactly what I want without the mess.
t15.name: Mia Anderson

t16.text: Beautiful gradients, smooth UX, and top-tier AI generation. What more could you ask for?

t17.text: It handles complex architectural prompts better than paid alternatives. Truly impressive.
t17.name: Isabella Garcia

t18.text: A fantastic resource for storyboarding. It brings my scripts to life instantly.
t18.name: William Martin

home.seoText: Lavie AI is a powerful free AI image generator that allows you to transform text into stunning visual art in seconds. Whether you need photorealistic images, anime illustrations, 3D renders, or digital art, our text-to-image generator delivers exceptional quality without any signup required. Create unlimited AI pictures, backgrounds, and assets for your creative projects today.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Lavie AI Image Generator
faq.subtitle: Have another question? Contact us at support@LavieAI.net

q1.q: Is Lavie AI Image Generator really free to use?
q1.a: Yes! Lavie AI Image Generator is completely free to use. As a leading free AI image generator, we offer free daily credits so you can generate AI art and images without any payment. No credit card required.

q2.q: Do I need to create an account to use the AI Image Generator?
q2.a: No login is required to use Lavie AI! You can start generating AI images immediately with our AI image generator. However, creating a free Lavie AI account lets you save your AI image generation history and access more advanced AI generator features.

q3.q: Can I use AI images generated by Lavie AI commercially?
q3.a: Yes, but it depends on your account status. Images generated by active Premium Subscribers (Creator, Plus, Studio) can be used for both personal and commercial purposes, and you retain full ownership. Images generated by Free registered users and Guest Users belong to Lavie AI and are licensed for personal use only.

q4.q: Is my data kept private when using Lavie AI Image Generator?
q4.a: For Premium Subscribers, all generated images are private by default and securely stored in your personal history, giving you full control to delete them anytime. Free and Guest generations are public and appear on our photo wall to inspire others. To manage server space, we periodically clear older guest generations. Most importantly, your images and prompts are never used to train our AI models.

q5.q: What AI models does Lavie AI Image Generator use?
q5.a: Lavie AI Image Generator uses state-of-the-art AI models including FLUX.2 (flux-2-pro), Stable Diffusion (stable-diffusion-3.5-large), Qwen-Image, and Google's Nano Banana Pro. Our smart routing system automatically selects the best AI image generator model based on your prompt.

q6.q: What AI image styles are available in Lavie AI?
q6.a: Lavie AI Image Generator offers 32 different AI art styles including Photorealistic scenes, Anime-style images, Digital art, Artistic illustrations, 3D Render, Cinematic lighting, Cyberpunk, and many more. Our AI image generator is constantly updated with trending styles.

q7.q: How fast can Lavie AI generate an image?
q7.a: With Fast Mode enabled, our AI image generator creates most AI images in just a few seconds. Standard AI image generation with Lavie AI typically takes 10-30 seconds depending on complexity and server load.

q8.q: Why are there sometimes deformities in AI generated images?
q8.a: This is a common challenge for all AI image generators. To improve results, use our 'Negative Prompt' feature to exclude things like 'bad anatomy, extra fingers'. You can also try generating again or using our advanced AI image generator models for better accuracy.

q9.q: How can I provide feedback or report issues?
q9.a: We welcome your feedback! You can reach our support team at support@LavieAI.net. Your input helps us improve and maintain the best free AI image generation service.

q10.a: We're constantly improving our service with regular updates to the AI model and user interface. Future plans include mobile apps and additional creative features, while maintaining our commitment to being completely free.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more
pricing.readyDesc: Start generating amazing AI art today with Lavie AI Image Generator.

q1.q: How does the credit system work?
q1.a: Generating images consumes credits based on the AI model you choose. Basic Fast models cost 4 credits, Pro models cost 12 credits, Max models cost 20 credits, and Ultra models cost 36 credits. Free users receive 10 daily credits to try out the models.

q2.q: Do I own the copyright to the images I generate?
q2.a: Yes, if you have an active Subscription! All images generated with premium accounts (Creator, Plus, Studio) include full commercial usage rights. However, images generated by Free registered users and Guest Users belong to Lavie AI and are for personal use only.

q3.q: Are my generated images public or private?
q3.a: It depends on your account status. Free and Guest generations are public by default and appear on our inspiration gallery. If you have an active Subscription, your images are private by default, giving you full control to manage or delete them.

q4.q: What AI models are included in the plans?
q4.a: We offer a range of industry-leading models. Our Basic tier includes FLUX.2 Dev and SDXL. Pro models include SD 3.5 Medium and Seedream. Max models feature SD 3.5 Large and FLUX.2 Max, while our Ultra tier unlocks Nano Banana Pro and FLUX.2 Flex.

q5.q: How can I fix AI artifacts like deformed hands?
q5.a: AI models occasionally struggle with complex details like hands or text. We recommend using our 'Negative Prompt' feature to exclude specific flaws (e.g., typing 'bad anatomy, extra fingers'). Upgrading to Max or Ultra models also significantly improves detail accuracy.

q6.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
q6.a: Yes, you can cancel your Lavie AI subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access to your plan's features and credits until the end of your current billing period.

blog.title: Lavie AI Blog & Guides
blog.description: Discover tips, tutorials, and inspiration for creating stunning AI art.

anime.title: The Ultimate Guide to Anime AI Art Prompts in 2026
anime.excerpt: Master the art of generating breathtaking anime-style images with these proven prompt structures and keywords.
anime.content:
Creating the perfect anime illustration requires more than just typing 'anime style'. To get consistent, high-quality results, you need to understand how the AI interprets specific stylistic keywords.

1. Start with the Medium and Style

Always begin your prompt by defining the exact visual style. Use combinations like 'masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed anime illustration, studio ghibli style, makoto shinkai' to set a high baseline for quality.

2. Subject Description

Be specific about your character. Describe their hair color, eye shape, clothing, and pose. For example: '1girl, silver hair flowing in the wind, glowing red eyes, wearing a futuristic cyberpunk jacket, dynamic pose, looking at viewer'.

3. Lighting and Environment

Lighting makes or breaks an image. Add keywords like 'cinematic lighting, rim lighting, lens flare, depth of field'. For the background, be just as descriptive: 'standing in a neon-lit tokyo street, rain puddles reflecting lights, cyberpunk city background'.

Pro Tip: Use the negative prompt to avoid common AI artifacts like 'bad anatomy, extra fingers, missing limbs, blurry'.

ecommerce.title: How to Generate Professional E-commerce Product Backgrounds
ecommerce.excerpt: Save thousands on product photography by using AI to generate realistic, stunning backgrounds for your products.
ecommerce.content:
High-quality product imagery is crucial for e-commerce conversion rates. With Lavie AI, you can generate endless variations of lifestyle and studio backgrounds without renting a studio.

The Setup

When generating backgrounds, you want the focus to remain on where your product will eventually be placed. Use prompts that create natural 'pedestals' or clear spaces.

Studio Prompts

Try this for a clean look: 'Minimalist product photography background, white marble podium, soft pastel pink background, elegant morning sunlight, sharp shadows, 8k, photorealistic'.

Lifestyle Prompts

For a more natural setting: 'Cozy modern living room background, blurred depth of field, wooden coffee table in focus, sunlight streaming through window, indoor plants, soft warm lighting, professional interior photography'.

Integration

Once generated, use your favorite photo editing tool to remove the background of your actual product and place it onto the AI-generated scene. The matching lighting and shadows will make it look like a real photoshoot.

negative.title: Mastering Negative Prompts: What They Are and How to Use Them
negative.excerpt: Sometimes telling the AI what NOT to draw is more important than telling it what to draw. Learn the secrets of negative prompting.
negative.content:
A negative prompt is a set of instructions that tells the AI image generator exactly what elements, styles, or artifacts it should avoid including in the final output. It acts as a filter, cleaning up the generation process.

Why Use Negative Prompts?

AI models are trained on vast datasets that include both masterpieces and poorly drawn images. By using negative prompts, you force the AI to steer clear of the 'bad' data.

The Essential Negative Prompt Formula

For almost every generation, especially human subjects, you should include a base negative prompt like this:
'ugly, duplicate, morbid, mutilated, extra fingers, mutated hands, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, blurry, bad anatomy, bad proportions, extra limbs, cloned face, disfigured, gross proportions'

Style-Specific Negatives

If you want a photorealistic image, use negative prompts to avoid artistic styles: 'illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, 3d render, sketch, drawing, watermark, signature'.

Experimenting with negative prompts is just as important as tweaking your main prompt. Don't be afraid to add specific things you want removed, like 'red cars, text, clouds' if they keep appearing unwanted in your generations.
